Bus Timings

C28 Bus Timetable Mamzar Beach Park Terminus to Al Baraha Bus Station

January 19, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus C28 offers a vital link between Mamzar Beach Park Terminus and Al Baraha Bus Station, serving as a crucial transportation option for both residents and visitors in Dubai. This bus route provides convenient access to various neighborhoods and key locations throughout Deira, making it an essential service for commuting and local travel.

Route Name C28
Route Description Mamzar Beach Park Terminus - Al Baraha Bus Station
Total Distance Approximately 7 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 40 minutes
Operational Hours 06:00 to 21:50 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Bus C28 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus C28 runs with the following schedule:

From Mamzar Beach Park Terminus From Al Baraha Bus Station
06:00 06:00
06:35 06:31
07:10 07:00
07:45 07:30
08:15 08:00
08:45 08:30

18:50 18:30
19:35 19:00
20:05 19:25
20:35 19:55
21:05 20:25
21:25 21:05

Bus C28 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link for C28 Bus Timings. And for the timetable from Al Ghubaiba Bus Station to Abu Dhabi, you can check the timetable below:

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for traveling on Bus C28 is AED 3. This affordable pricing makes it easy for passengers to travel comfortably and efficiently between key destinations in Dubai. With its budget-friendly cost, Bus C28 offers an economical option for daily commutes and city exploration, making it accessible to a wide range of travelers.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus C28 does not offer online booking options. Passengers can board the bus at any of the designated stops along the route without needing a prior reservation.

Bus Route

The C28 bus route starts at Mamzar Beach Park Terminus and travels through a diverse set of stops, including:

  1. Mamzar Beach Park Terminus

  2. Mamzar Beach, 8

  3. Mamzar Beach, 7

  4. Mamzar Beach, 6

  5. Mamzar Beach, 5

  6. Mamzar Beach, 4

  7. Mamzar Beach, 3

  8. Mamzar Beach, 2

  9. Mamzar Beach

  10. Mamzar, Health Center

  11. Sheikh Almar Masjid

  12. Hamriya

  13. Wuhaida, School

  14. Ali Bin Abi Talib Mosque

  15. Wuheida, Street 22

  16. UAE Athletics Federation

  17. Masjid

  18. Hamriya, Street

  19. Masjid Al Salam

  20. Abu Hail

  21. Masjid Ashram

  22. Majid English School

  23. Hor Al Anz, Turnoff

  24. Abu Baker Al Siddique Road

  25. The Center

  26. Muraqqabat, Police Station

  15. Hyatt Regency Hotel

  16. Al Baraha Bus Station

Other bus routes in Dubai that you can explore include the C3 bus route, which runs from Abu Hail Bus Station to Al Karama Bus Station, and the 27 bus route, which travels between The Dubai Mall and Gold Souq Bus Station.

Bus C28 Station Overview

Mamzar Beach Park Terminus

Mamzar Beach Park Terminus is a prominent bus station located near the popular Mamzar Beach Park in Dubai. It serves as a key transit hub for passengers visiting the park and the surrounding area.

The station is well-equipped with essential amenities, including sheltered waiting areas and real-time bus schedule information, ensuring a comfortable and efficient travel experience. Its proximity to the beach park makes it a convenient choice for those heading to enjoy recreational activities and leisure time at one of Dubai’s scenic waterfronts.

Intersection at Abu Hail, Masjid Al Salam 1 Bus Stop

The Abu Hail, Masjid Al Salam 1 Bus Stop serves as a crucial intersection point for multiple bus routes, including Bus Route C3 and Bus Route C28. This central location facilitates convenient transfers between these routes, enhancing connectivity for passengers traveling across various areas. The stop is well-equipped with essential amenities, providing a seamless transit experience and ensuring efficient travel throughout the city.

Al Ras Metro Bus Stop Intersection

This strategic location provides seamless connectivity for passengers traveling across various parts of the city, making it a vital hub for efficient travel and convenient transfers between different bus services.

Al Baraha Bus Station

Al Baraha Bus Station is a central transit point located in the Al Baraha area of Dubai. This bus station is a vital component of the local transportation network, providing access to various bus routes and connecting passengers to key destinations across the city.

The station features comfortable seating, ticketing services, and up-to-date schedule information, making it an essential hub for daily commuters and travelers.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus C28 passes by several notable tourist attractions and destinations in Dubai. Here are some key highlights:

  1. Mamzar Beach Park: A popular leisure destination with beautiful beaches, picnic areas, and jogging tracks.

  2. Reef Mall: A well-known shopping center in Deira offering a variety of retail options and dining choices.

  3. Union Metro Station: Located in a central area, it provides access to various attractions and is close to historical sites in Deira.

  4. Salah Al Din Metro Station: A major transport hub that connects to other significant areas and landmarks in Dubai.

5.

  1. Al Ras Public Library: A cultural spot where visitors can explore local literature and enjoy a quiet reading environment.

These locations make Bus C28 a convenient option for both locals and tourists exploring key spots in Dubai.

Journey Experience

Taking the C28 bus from Mamzar Beach Park Terminus to Al Baraha Bus Station offers a scenic journey through the heart of Dubai. The route is quite long, but it passes by some notable areas, providing a blend of urban landscapes and coastal views. Starting near Mamzar Beach Park, one of Dubai’s picturesque spots known for its sandy shores and family-friendly picnic spots, the route gives you glimpses of residential neighborhoods and bustling city streets.

The trip offers a fascinating view of both modern and traditional Dubai, showcasing the city’s diverse character.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily travel to Al Baraha Bus Station, the furthest point on the C28 bus route starting from Mamzar Beach Park Terminus. The ride offers a convenient and cost-effective option, with a price range of AED 29-34. Using Careem ensures a smooth and hassle-free journey, making it simple to reach your destination comfortably.

This comprehensive guide to Bus C28 helps you navigate Dubai’s extensive bus network with ease, ensuring you can reach your desired destinations conveniently. With regular service and affordable fares, Bus C28 is a practical choice for both daily commutes and exploring the city’s vibrant neighborhoods.

Official UAE Sources

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
